message:
🐛 Fix message sending + collapsible provider groups (#20)

- sendInput: re-resume session when process stdin is not writable
- WebSocket input: auto-resume unmanaged sessions with prompt
- Sidebar: collapsible Copilot group with chevron and session count
- Clean up stale managed processes before re-resuming

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
